summary: District disruption may affect Tower Hill: Minor Delays. District Line: No service between Turnham Green and Ealing Broadway due to planned engineering work and MINOR DELAYS between Parsons Green and Wimbledon due to an earlier obstruction on the track. GOOD SERVICE on the rest of the line.
